response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with C++ and geospatial data processing, but lacks direct experience in the specific technologies and industries mentioned in the job description.
strengths: Experience with C++ and geospatial data processing
Strong background in software development across multiple platforms
Proven ability to work on complex projects and contribute to open-source initiatives
concerns: Lack of direct experience with modern C++ and Linux server applications
No clear experience with navigation systems or routing data pipelines
Primary experience is with JavaScript/TypeScript and other non-C++ technologies

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in navigation systems
